config.script:
# Get the table data
	table_data = self.parent.parent.getChild("tblContainer").getChild("Table").props.data
	table_data = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(table_data)
	# Check if the table contains data
	if table_data is not None and len(table_data) > 0:
	    # If data is available, export it to Excel and trigger download
	    try:
	        # Convert the data to Excel format
	        excel_data = system.dataset.toExcel(True, [table_data])  # True flag means to include headers
	        
	        # Trigger the download
	        system.perspective.download(fileName="TrackingReport_LegacyAxle.xlsx", data=excel_data)
	
	        # Success message
	
	    except Exception as e:
	        # Handle any exceptions during the download or conversion
	        pass
	else:
	    # If no data is available, show a message
	    pass
